security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:8780 ws://localhost:8765 ws://localhost:8766 ws://127.0.0.1:8765 ws://127.0.0.1:8766; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com

bundle.shortDescription: Live log viewer for Android and iOS devices
bundle.longDescription: AppLogsViewer streams live device logs from adb logcat (Android) and idevicesyslog (iOS) into a unified native window with search, filter, and export.
